ab: Makamaan saw kisu a tara i taluan?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: Makakarireng kaku a tara i taluan.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: Makamaan saw cira a tara i paisingan?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: Rakaten nira a tara i paisingan.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: Makamaan saw kisu a tara i Peng-hu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Makahikuki kaku a tara i Peng-hu.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: Makamaan saw kisu a tara i Peng-hu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: Makalunan kaku a tara i Peng-hu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: Makamaan saw kisu a taluma’?
en: How do you go home?

ab: Makaciyeyun kaku a taluma’.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: Makamaan saw ci Panay a tara i cacudadan?
en: How does Panay go to school?

ab: Makasilamalay a talacudadan ci Panay.
en: Panay goes to school by train.

ab: Makamaan saw ci Kacaw a tara i kyokay?
en: How does Kacaw go to church?

ab: Makavatikar ci Kacaw a tala kyokay.
en: Kacaw goes to church by bicycle.

ab: Makaciyeyun haw kisu a micudad?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: Caay, makavasu kaku a micudad.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: Makatikar haw kisu a micudad?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: Hay, makavatikar kaku a micudad.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: Makakawtye haw kisu a tara Takao?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: Hay, makakawtye kaku a tala Takao.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: U silamalay haw anusa makahikuki kisu a tara Taytung?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: Makahikuki kaku, ki’ayawen nu hikuki ku silamalay.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: A makavasu haw kisu a tala kiyokay anusa a parakat tu karireng kisu?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: A parakat kaku tu karireng a tala kyokay, mangalav ku nikacaluwayan a makavasu.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: Hacuwa saw ku nikararaay nu patiyamay atu luma’ namu?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: Caay kangata isaw, makaotovay tu kaku a tara i patiyamay.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: Mangangata haw ku yuving atu cacudadan?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: Mangata, rakat han a tangasatu.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: Mangangata haw ku kakaenan atu pangiruan?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: I kaepudan a pangiruan, pasatimulen ku rakat, lima a sasuritan hakiya ku nirakatan tangsa tu ku kakatayraan.
ch: B:出車站往南走,再走五分鐘目的地了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
